name: Orange Carrot Cake ~
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream butter and sugar in a large bowl using an electric mixer.
3. Add cinnamon, nutmeg, and orange peel; beat until well combined.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Mix in grated carrots.
6. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
7. Alternately add the sifted ingredients with orange juice to the bowl with butter and sugar mixture.
8. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
9. Bake for 60 to 65 minutes.
10. Turn out of the pan and cool completely on a wire rack.
11. In a small bowl, beat sugar with butter, orange peel, and enough orange juice to make a slightly runny glaze.
12. Cover top of cake with glaze and decorate with orange slices.
